scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "yarn workspace rentars-backend dev" "yarn workspace web dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace rentars-backend build && yarn workspace web build
scripts.test: yarn workspace rentars-backend test && yarn workspace web test
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name '.next' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +
